/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmower_description__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/mower_description/libmower_description__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/mower_description__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/mower_description/srv/_cutting_motor_control_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/q/Algorithm_research/DWA_ws/build/mower_description:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libmower_description__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so libmower_description__rosidl_generator_c.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
